title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
